fixtures._comment: tool-rendering-default-catchall — 'weather in Tokyo' turn. Emits get_weather tool call. The built-in default catchall renderer fires (CopilotKit's own renderer for unhandled tools), rendering [data-testid='copilot-tool-render'][data-tool-name='get_weather'] with a status pill.
tool-rendering-default-catchall — follow-up after get_weather tool result.

response.content: Tokyo is 22°C and partly cloudy with light easterly winds.
